title: Mumford & Sons
full_description: Mumford & Sons return to the Netherlands on the Rushmere Tour — their most acclaimed run in years, supporting the album named for the pond on Wimbledon Common where Marcus Mumford, Ben Lovett and Ted Dwane first met. Electrifying live performances that build from intimate acoustic moments to explosive crescendos.
ai_summary: Mumford & Sons' Rushmere Tour — supporting their album named for the Wimbledon pond where the band first formed — brought their folk-rock anthems back to Amsterdam's Ziggo Dome for one of the most emotionally charged arena shows of the year.
